description: Basic 3D building-block parts (GZ-3D.3). Renderer-NEUTRAL DATA: each part is a `mesh:{source:'primitive', shape, params}` scene_node — asset-free, portable across renderers (Godot + three.js via GLB). To drop a part in a scene, wire a Model/primitive node with the part's `shape` and (optionally) override its `params`; unset params fall back to the defaults below. This catalog is the vocabulary the evolver / procgen / the Lathe draw from.

parts.name: box
parts.description: Axis-aligned rectangular box — the fundamental cuboid building block.

parts.name: sphere
parts.description: UV sphere — round ball / dome primitive.

parts.name: cylinder
parts.description: Straight cylinder — pillar / rod / disc (set height low). top/bottom radius tunable for a frustum.

radius.note: used for both caps unless overridden

parts.name: cone
parts.description: Cone — a cylinder with a zero-radius top; roof / spike / tree-canopy block.

parts.name: torus
parts.description: Torus (donut / ring) — closed loop, wheel, halo.

parts.name: plane
parts.description: Flat XZ plane / quad — floor, wall panel, billboard backing.

parts.name: capsule
parts.description: Capsule (stadium / pill) — rounded-end cylinder; limb, projectile, character body block.

height.note: total height incl. the two hemispherical caps

parts.name: prism
parts.description: Triangular prism (built-in) — a wedge whose apex slides along X via left_to_right (0..1); roof ridge, doorstop.

parts.name: wedge
parts.description: Right-angle ramp — full height at the -Z (back) edge sloping to 0 at +Z; slopes, roofs, terrain steps.

parts.name: pyramid
parts.description: Square-based pyramid — 4 triangular faces to an apex over a rectangular base; spire, monument, tree.

parts.name: tube
parts.description: Hollow cylinder (annular tube / pipe) — outer + inner walls with capped ends; pipe, well, ring gear.

parts.name: stairs
parts.description: Composite staircase — N equal boxes rising +Y and advancing +Z to fill total_height x total_depth.

parts.name: arch
parts.description: Composite semicircular arch — two piers + a ring of voussoirs bridging the span; gateway, bridge span, window frame.

width.note: clear span; the semicircle radius is width/2

height.note: total height to the crown; piers = height - radius

thickness.note: radial thickness of the arch ring + pier width
